hooks.command: echo '--- Session Start: Observer Agent ---' && echo 'Reading profiles...' && cat ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/profiles/observer-agent.md 2>/dev/null && echo '=== CHANGELOG (last 50 lines) ===' && tail -50 ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/knowledge/CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Pending Requests ===' && ls ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/requests/*observer* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending requests for observer agent' && echo '=== Notifications ===' && ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh check observer 2>/dev/null && ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh clean observer 2>/dev/null

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'shared/responses/'; then BASENAME=$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .md); TARGET=$(echo "$BASENAME" | sed 's/^[^-]*-//; s/_.*//' | head -c 20); ~/Desktop/OCAgents/shared/notify.sh signal "$TARGET" observer "$BASENAME" RESPONSE 2>/dev/null; fi

_comments.mcp_servers: Observer Agent uses Graylog (all tools) + BPA-cuba/BPA-jamaica (read-only: service, bot, muleservice info). All write tools are denied.
_comments.role: Observer Agent (Tracker) — Graylog log analysis, bot traceability, service health
